name: abi
description: Discover, plan, validate, execute, inspect, and report ABI bioinformatics workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Run reproducible bioinformatics workflows with ABI.
interface.longDescription: Use ABI to discover, plan, validate, execute, inspect, and report versioned bioinformatics workflows.
defaultPrompt: Discover the ABI workflows available in this environment.
Plan and dry-run an ABI bioinformatics analysis.
Inspect and validate an existing ABI result directory.
